zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Neville於1364年9月5日出生在英國諾廷加姆爾洛勒斯頓時，他的父親William DE NEVILLE MP29歲，母親Elizabeth Fencotte26歲。他於大約1385年與Alice de Longford在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 哈波洛結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1420年在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾洛勒斯頓享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Neville于1364年9月5日出生在英国諾廷加姆爾洛勒斯頓时，他的父亲William DE NEVILLE MP29岁，母亲Elizabeth Fencotte26岁。他于大约1385年与Alice de Longford在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 哈波洛结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1420年在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾洛勒斯頓享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Neville was born on 5 September 1364, in Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, William DE NEVILLE MP, was 29 and his mother, Elizabeth Fencotte, was 26. He married Alice de Longford about 1385, in Market Harborough, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1420, in Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Neville est né le 5 septembre 1364, à Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, William DE NEVILLE MP, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Fencotte, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Longford environ 1385, à Market Harborough, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1420, à Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Nevilleが1364年9月5日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアロレストンで生まれた時，父William DE NEVILLE MPは29歳，母Elizabeth Fencotteは26歳であった。約1385年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアマーケト ハーボロウでAlice de Longfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1420年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアロレストンで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Neville(이)가 1364년 9월 5일 영국 노틴그함실르 롤레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William DE NEVILLE MP(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Fencotte(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 마크트 하르버루그h에서 Alice de Longford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 롤레스턴에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Neville родился 5 сентября 1364 г. в местности роллестон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William DE NEVILLE MP было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Fencotte, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Longford около 1385 г. в местности маркет харбороую, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1420 г. в местности роллестон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.
